ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with good readability. Original certificate with ICC stamps and QR code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 13 pages, with detailed line items, totals, and transport details. SKF branded.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-423075' does not contain LC banking terminology. No fields labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar are present.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header/issuer block 'SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: footer 'Issued by: SKF Sverige AB'
Invoice pages 2-13: repeated in header and footer as issuer

pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate references invoice 9148083, matching invoice number 0009148083; (2) Consignor SKF Sverige AB is the invoice issuer; (3) Consignee SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. appears as Bill to/Sold to/Ship to in the invoice.

candidates.raw_text: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM
candidates.normalized_text: deep groove ball brg od > 30 mm

consignor.certificate_value: SKF Sverige AB, Kvibergs Broväg 8, SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden (Issuer)

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.reasoning: Consignor name 'SKF Sverige AB' is explicitly found as the invoice issuer in the header on all 13 pages of the invoice. Name match is exact after normalization.
Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice issuer address explicitly states 'Sweden'. VAT number prefix 'SE' also confirms Sweden. Land matches.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Land verification via VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden

evidence.description: Certificate consignor: SKF Sverige AB, Sweden
Invoice issuer: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'SKF Sverige AB' in Sweden is identified as the exact same entity as the invoice issuer 'SKF Sverige AB' in Sweden. The company name matches exactly after normalization. The street address differs (Kvibergs Broväg 8 in certificate vs von Utfallsgatan 4 in invoice), but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not in themselves cause MISMATCH — only company name and country matter. Country is Sweden in both documents, confirmed by explicit text and VAT prefix SE. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Different street addresses indicate different legal entities
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address do not in themselves cause MISMATCH. Company name and country are the decisive factors, and both match exactly.

consignee.certificate_value: SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd, 105 Ton Dat Tien,Tan Phu Ward c/o Schenker Logistics (M) S/B) No D-08, Jalan Tanjung A/4 81560 Tanjung Pelepas, Pelabuhan Malaysia
consignee.invoice_value: SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd., c/o Schenker Logistics (M) S/B), No D-08, Jalan Tanjung A/4, 81560 Tanjung Pelepas, Pelabuhan, Malaysia (Bill to / Sold to / Ship to)

comparison_steps.description: Priority 1 – search in primary billing fields (Bill to)
comparison_steps.reasoning: Invoice Bill to field contains 'SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd.' which matches certificate consignee 'SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd' after normalization (trailing period is a minor formatting difference). Same company name.
Certificate states Malaysia. Invoice Bill to address states Malaysia. Countries match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – Bill to field is primary billing field
Normalization of company designations (Pte. Ltd vs Pte. Ltd.)
MATCH – company name identified and country matches

evidence.description: Certificate consignee: SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd, Malaysia
Invoice Bill to: SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd., Malaysia

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd' matches the invoice Bill to party 'SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd.' exactly after normalization (the only difference is a trailing period). The address in the certificate includes an additional line '105 Ton Dat Tien,Tan Phu Ward' before the c/o address, but the shared c/o address (Schenker Logistics, Jalan Tanjung A/4, 81560 Tanjung Pelepas) and country (Malaysia) are consistent. Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate includes additional address line '105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward' not in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.4, differences in address details do not cause MISMATCH. The company name and country match. The additional address line in the certificate likely refers to a local office address that was prepended to the c/o delivery address.

goods_description.certificate_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM; SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
goods_description.invoice_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM (HS 8482100000); SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM (HS 8482100000); SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG (HS 8482300000)

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers in certificate – skip to Priority 2
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate does not list specific article/part numbers in the goods description field. It uses general product category descriptions.

comparison_steps.description: Controlled text matching – identify identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate line 1: 'DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' – this exact string is found in the invoice on page 1 and repeatedly on pages 3 onwards for HS code 8482100000 items. Certificate line 2: 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG' – this exact string is found in the invoice on page 1 and repeatedly on pages 4 onwards for HS code 8482300000 items. Both identity-bearing main designations are present in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Additional items in invoice that are not in certificate
comparison_steps.reasoning: The invoice contains 'SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' (10 pcs) which is not listed in the certificate. However, per the unilateral verification principle (2.1), the system only checks that items IN the certificate can be found in the invoice. Additional items in the invoice that have no counterpart in the certificate do not in themselves cause MISMATCH. Both certificate items ('DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' and 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG') are found in the invoice. Note: the quantity analysis below will address whether the certificate's 635 pcs for DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG accounts for the 625 DEEP GROOVE + 10 SELF-ALIGNING shown separately in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation identified and found in invoice
Additional items in invoice do not cause MISMATCH per unilateral verification principle
Unilateral verification – certificate items found in invoice

evidence.description: Certificate goods line 1: 'DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM'
Invoice goods: 'DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' with qty 625
Invoice goods: 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG' with qty 545
Invoice goods: 'SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' with qty 10

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate lists two product categories: 'DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' and 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG'. Both are found verbatim in the invoice. The invoice additionally lists 'SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' (10 pcs) which is not in the certificate. Per the unilateral verification principle (2.1), additional items in the invoice do not cause MISMATCH. Both certificate goods descriptions are verified as present in the invoice. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG in invoice but not in certificate causes MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per unilateral verification principle (2.1), the system only checks that certificate items exist in the invoice. Additional invoice items without certificate counterparts do not cause MISMATCH.

quantity.certificate_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM: 635 pcs; SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG: 545 pcs
quantity.invoice_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM: 625 pcs; SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM: 10 pcs; SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG: 545 pcs; Total: 1180 pcs

comparison_steps.description: Direct identification – SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG: 545 pcs
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate states 545 pcs for SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG. Invoice summary on page 1 shows SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG: 545. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Direct identification – DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG: 635 pcs
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate states 635 pcs for DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM. Invoice shows 625 pcs for DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM and 10 pcs for SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM. The value 635 does not appear directly in the invoice for this product category. Proceeding to undantag 3D.
Only one invoice is present. 3A requires multiple invoices.
Both certificate and invoice use pcs. No unit conversion needed.

comparison_steps.description: Exception 3D – Multi-row summation within same invoice
comparison_steps.reasoning: The certificate lists 'DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' as 635 pcs. The invoice has two line categories under HS code 8482100000: 'DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' (625 pcs) and 'SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' (10 pcs). Both are under the same HS code 8482100000 and share the description pattern 'BALL BRG OD > 30 MM'. The certificate uses a general/collecting description 'DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' which in the customs summary on page 1 corresponds to HS 8482100000 totaling 625+10=635. Per 4.4.5.5.1 (generell/samlande varubeskrivning), when the certificate uses a general description and the invoice contains multiple variant rows of the same product family under the same HS code, summation is allowed. 625 + 10 = 635 pcs. Exact match with certificate value of 635 pcs.

rules_applied.description: Direct identification for SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG: 545 pcs matches
Both numeric value and unit (pcs) are present in certificate
Exception 3D – Multi-row summation: 625 + 10 = 635 pcs for ball bearings under HS 8482100000
Generell/samlande varubeskrivning – certificate general description covers multiple invoice variant rows in same product family

evidence.description: Certificate quantity line 1: 635 pcs (DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG)
Certificate quantity line 2: 545 pcs (SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG)
Invoice: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM qty 625, HS 8482100000
Invoice: SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM qty 10, HS 8482100000
Invoice: SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG qty 545, HS 8482300000

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate lists two quantities: 635 pcs (DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG) and 545 pcs (SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG). For SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, invoice shows 545 pcs — exact match via direct identification (4.4.1). For DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, invoice shows 625 pcs under that exact description plus 10 pcs under 'SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM', both under HS 8482100000. Certificate value 635 is not directly found. Applying exception 3D (4.4.5.5) with the generell/samlande extension (4.4.5.5.1): both invoice lines are bearings under HS 8482100000 (same product family — ball bearings OD > 30 MM), same unit (pcs), same invoice, same origin. Summation: 625 + 10 = 635. Exact match. Both certificate quantities verified. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate says 635 pcs DEEP GROOVE but invoice only shows 625 DEEP GROOVE — MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Exception 3D with 4.4.5.5.1 allows summation of variant rows within the same product family (HS 8482100000 ball bearings). 625 + 10 = 635 exactly matches the certificate value.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Sweden (Country of origin header on page 1); SE per line item on pages 3-12

comparison_steps.reasoning: Invoice page 1 has a column header 'Country of origin' with value 'Sweden' listed above the goods lines. Invoice pages 3-12 show 'SE' as country of origin per line item. 'SE' is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden.
Certificate states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice states 'Sweden' and 'SE'. After normalization (case insensitive, ISO code to full name), these are identical. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice
Normalization of country name – SWEDEN = Sweden = SE (ISO alpha-2)
MATCH – origin explicitly identified in invoice

evidence.description: Invoice country of origin: 'Sweden' (column header, page 1) and 'SE' per line (pages 3-12)

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states origin as 'SWEDEN'. Invoice page 1 shows 'Country of origin: Sweden' as a column header, and all individual line items on pages 3-12 show 'SE' (ISO code for Sweden) as country of origin. All goods have Swedish origin. After normalization, SWEDEN = Sweden = SE. Single origin, consistent across all lines. MATCH per 4.5.4 and 4.5.5.

rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: No LC reference found in certificate
Two separate files: one certificate, one invoice. Certificate references invoice 9148083 which matches invoice file number 0009148083.
All three criteria met: invoice number matches, consignor found in invoice, consignee found in invoice.
SKF Sverige AB found explicitly as invoice issuer
SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. found in Bill to field
Both product descriptions found verbatim in invoice

rule_evaluation_log.description: Quantity – Direct identification SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG 545
Quantity – Exception 3D multi-row summation for DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren SKF Sverige AB och mottagaren SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. kan verifieras i fakturan. Varubeskrivningarna och kvantiteterna matchar (635 pcs kullagerlager och 545 pcs sfäriska rullager). Ursprungsland Sverige bekräftas i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
warnings: Certificate lists 635 pcs DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG but invoice separates into 625 DEEP GROOVE + 10 SELF-ALIGNING under same HS code. Verified via exception 3D summation.
Consignor street address differs between certificate (Kvibergs Broväg 8) and invoice (von Utfallsgatan 4) – not grounds for MISMATCH per rules.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: SKF Sverige AB, Kvibergs Broväg 8, SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly as invoice issuer
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'SKF Sverige AB' i Sverige identifieras som samma juridiska person som fakturautställaren 'SKF Sverige AB' i Sverige. Företagsnamnet matchar exakt. Gatuadressen skiljer sig (Kvibergs Broväg 8 vs von Utfallsgatan 4) men detta påverkar inte bedömningen. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd, c/o Schenker Logistics (M) S/B), No D-08, Jalan Tanjung A/4, 81560 Tanjung Pelepas, Pelabuhan, Malaysia
sections.invoice_value: SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd., c/o Schenker Logistics (M) S/B), No D-08, Jalan Tanjung A/4, 81560 Tanjung Pelepas, Pelabuhan, Malaysia
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens företagsnamn identifierat i fakturans Bill to-fält, land överensstämmer
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd' matchar fakturans Bill to-part 'SKF Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd.' efter normalisering. Landet Malaysia överensstämmer. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM; SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
sections.invoice_value: DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM; SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM; SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningar identifierade i fakturan
sections.motivation: Båda certifikatets varubeskrivningar ('DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' och 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG') återfinns ordagrant i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller dessutom 'SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG OD > 30 MM' som inte finns i certifikatet, men ytterligare varor i fakturan utgör inte grund för MISMATCH enligt ensidig verifiering. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: 635 pcs (DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG); 545 pcs (SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG)
sections.invoice_value: 625 pcs (DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG); 10 pcs (SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG); 545 pcs (SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG); Total 1180 pcs
sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering för 545 pcs; Undantag 3D – summering av rader inom samma produktfamilj för 635 pcs
sections.motivation: SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG: 545 pcs i certifikatet matchar 545 pcs i fakturan direkt. DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG: 635 pcs i certifikatet matchar inte direkt (fakturan visar 625 pcs DEEP GROOVE + 10 pcs SELF-ALIGNING). Båda kategorierna delar HS-kod 8482100000 och tillhör samma produktfamilj (kullager OD > 30 MM). Undantag 3D med samlande varubeskrivning tillåter summering: 625 + 10 = 635 pcs. Exakt matchning. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Normalisering av landsnamn – SWEDEN = Sweden = SE (ISO alfa-2)
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland SWEDEN. Fakturan anger 'Sweden' som Country of origin på sida 1 och 'SE' per artikelrad på sidorna 3–12. Samtliga varor har svenskt ursprung. Överensstämmer efter normalisering. MATCH.
